title: medicago hispida subsp. apiculata
intro: Medicago hispida subsp. apiculata, also known as the prickly medick or prickly lucerne, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to southern Europe and the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. The health benefits of Medicago hispida subsp. apiculata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
